patch.value: registerItemFields/registerItemTypes: validate declared field type against known coercion kinds with did-you-mean

SDK audit F6: validateItemFieldDefinitions only checks name/type are non-empty strings; a typo'd field type (e.g. 'strnig') passes activation and fails opaquely at use time though SDK.md says --field coerces by declared type. Validate type against the known field-type enum at registration with a did-you-mean hint (Damerau-Levenshtein helper exists).
